name: NIST SSDF: PO — Toolchain Secured
description: Supporting toolchains and development environments are configured to improve security (PO.3).
rationale: SSDF PO.3: implement supporting toolchains and secure the environments used for development.

examples.fails: the required secure-development step is absent

source: NIST SP 800-218 — Secure Software Development Framework (SSDF) v1.1, organised into PO (Prepare the Organization), PS (Protect the Software), PW (Produce Well-Secured Software), RV (Respond to Vulnerabilities). https://csrc.nist.gov/Projects/ssdf
